name: PCCOOLER CPS YS1000 Fully Modular Power Supply, 80 PLUS Gold 1000W PSU, 12V-2x6 Cable, ATX 3.1 & PCIe 5.1 Ready, 105°C Rated Japanese Capacitors, ECO Mode, 135mm FDB Fan, 12 Years Warranty and PCCOOLER CPS DC360 Pro ARGB Display AIO CPU Liquid Cooler, 360mm Radiator, 310W TDP, Customizable 2.4" IPS LCD Display, Ceramic Bearing, for Intel LGA 1851/1700/1200/115X & AMD AM5/AM4, Black

description: Bundle combining a 1000W 80 PLUS Gold fully modular power supply with a 360mm AIO liquid CPU cooler featuring customizable IPS LCD display, designed for high-end PC builds.
